mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls above 100k signals strong labor market conditions, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in < 40% of triggered instances, or the monthly payroll growth fails to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r < 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and housing starts indicates robust economic activity, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as corporate profits expand.
failure_condition: The joint movement of INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.05) or the interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: In a monetary tightening regime, rising federal funds rates signal higher discount rates that depress equity valuations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in < 30% of triggered instances, or the rate hike signal shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in real sales of new single-family homes indicates strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to show positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST is rising, or the correlation between HOUST and SPX returns drops below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading below 2.5% indicates stable inflation, allowing central banks to maintain accommodative policies and supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in < 40% of instances when CPI is below 2.5%, or the signal shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03).

mechanism_narrative: A combination of falling federal funds rates and stable CPI readings indicates an accommodative monetary policy environment, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL fails to predict SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.04) or the interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: In a post-recession recovery phase, declining real sales of new single-family homes signal improving consumer confidence, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in < 30% of instances during the specified regime, or the signal shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02).
